title: ThermoSafe – Current Risk ☀️❄️💨
highIrradianceWarning: ⚠️ Very high solar irradiance. Avoid direct exposure.
highUVIWarning: ⚠️ Very high UV index. Sun protection is essential!
irradianceTips: 👒 Wear a hat, sunglasses, and sunscreen. Avoid physical effort under direct sunlight.
alert_extreme: 🚨 EXTREME heat risk! Stop activity and hydrate immediately.
errorGPS: Unable to obtain temperature via GPS.
errorCity: No data found for this location. The latest available data is shown.
safe_conditions_text_day: No special measures are required at the moment.
follow_official_alerts: Follow official guidance and take extra precautions.
follow_official_alerts_soon: A weather alert is expected. It is advisable to anticipate it and review planned activities.
official_alert_active_multiple_text: Several official weather alerts are active. Check the details and take extra precautions.
official_alert_soon_multiple_text: Several official weather alerts are expected. Check the details before planning outdoor activity.

official_alert_active_hazard.rain: Rain alert active. Follow official guidance and take extra precautions.
official_alert_active_hazard.snow: Snow alert active. Follow official guidance and take extra precautions.
official_alert_active_hazard.wind: Wind alert active. Follow official guidance and take extra precautions.
official_alert_active_hazard.storm: Storm alerts active. Follow official guidance and take extra precautions.
official_alert_active_hazard.coast: Coastal and wave alert active. Follow official guidance and take extra precautions.
official_alert_active_hazard.fog: Fog alert active. Follow official guidance and take extra precautions.
official_alert_active_hazard.temp_min: Low temperature alert active. Follow official guidance and take extra precautions.
official_alert_active_hazard.temp_max: Extreme temperature alert active. Follow official guidance and take extra precautions.

official_alert_soon_hazard.rain: Rain is expected. Plan ahead and review the planned activity.
official_alert_soon_hazard.snow: Snow is expected. Plan ahead and review the planned activity.
official_alert_soon_hazard.wind: Wind is expected. Plan ahead and review the planned activity.
official_alert_soon_hazard.storm: Storms are expected. Plan ahead and review the planned activity.
official_alert_soon_hazard.coast: An official coastal and wave alert is expected. Plan ahead and review the planned activity.
official_alert_soon_hazard.fog: Fog is expected. Plan ahead and review the planned activity.
official_alert_soon_hazard.temp_min: Low temperatures are expected. Plan ahead and review the planned activity.
official_alert_soon_hazard.temp_max: Extreme temperatures are expected. Plan ahead and review the planned activity.

safe_conditions_text_night_warm: Elevated night-time temperatures. Ensure cross ventilation and wear light clothing.

heat.mildText: The apparent temperature is moderately elevated. Stay hydrated and adapt your activity if physical effort continues.
heat.mildLateDayText: Even though the sun is lower, the apparent temperature may still cause fatigue. Stay hydrated and avoid unnecessary effort.
heat.mildEveningText: Even though the sun has set, accumulated heat may still cause fatigue. Stay hydrated and avoid intense effort if you feel tired.
heat.hotNightText: The temperature remains elevated despite it being night. Stay hydrated and avoid intense physical effort until it cools down.
heat.moderateLateDayText: Although it is later in the day, the apparent temperature remains elevated. Reduce intense effort, stay hydrated and take breaks in cool places.

combinedRisk.highText: Several risk factors are present simultaneously. Reduce exposure and exercise extra caution.
combinedRisk.extremeText: The current combination of weather conditions requires maximum caution and limited outdoor exposure.

riskTrend.loading: The forecast for the next few hours is being calculated…
riskTrend.unavailable: The forecast for the next few hours is not available.
riskTrend.stable: Conditions are expected to remain similar over the next few hours.
riskTrend.improving: Conditions are expected to improve over the next few hours.
riskTrend.improving_heat: The apparent temperature is expected to ease over the next few hours.
riskTrend.improving_cold: Temperatures are expected to be less cold over the next few hours.
riskTrend.improving_wind: Wind is expected to ease over the next few hours.
riskTrend.improving_uv: UV radiation is expected to decrease over the next few hours.
riskTrend.improving_heat_cold: Temperatures are expected to become more favourable over the next few hours.
riskTrend.improving_heat_wind: The apparent temperature is expected to ease and winds should weaken over the next few hours.
riskTrend.improving_heat_uv: The apparent temperature and UV radiation are expected to ease over the next few hours.
riskTrend.improving_cold_wind: Temperatures are expected to be less cold and winds should weaken over the next few hours.
riskTrend.improving_cold_uv: Temperatures are expected to be less cold, with lower UV radiation over the next few hours.
riskTrend.improving_wind_uv: Winds should weaken and UV radiation is expected to decrease over the next few hours.
riskTrend.worseningAt: Conditions are expected to become more demanding between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worseningAt_heat: The apparent temperature is expected to be higher between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worseningAt_cold: Temperatures are expected to drop between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worseningAt_wind: Wind is expected to be stronger between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worseningAt_uv: Elevated UV radiation is expected between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worseningAt_heat_cold: More demanding temperature changes are expected between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worseningAt_heat_wind: The apparent temperature is expected to be higher, with stronger winds, between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worseningAt_heat_uv: The apparent temperature is expected to be higher, with elevated UV radiation, between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worseningAt_cold_wind: Temperatures are expected to drop and winds should strengthen between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worseningAt_cold_uv: Temperatures are expected to drop, with elevated UV radiation, between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worseningAt_wind_uv: Stronger wind and elevated UV radiation are expected mainly between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worsening_clearlyAt: Conditions are expected to become clearly more demanding between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worsening_clearlyAt_heat: The apparent temperature is expected to be clearly higher between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worsening_clearlyAt_cold: The cold is expected to feel more intense between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worsening_clearlyAt_wind: Much stronger wind is expected between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worsening_clearlyAt_uv: Very high UV radiation is expected between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worsening_clearlyAt_heat_cold: Clearly more demanding temperature changes are expected between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worsening_clearlyAt_heat_wind: The apparent temperature is expected to be higher, with much stronger winds, between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worsening_clearlyAt_heat_uv: The apparent temperature is expected to be higher, with very high UV radiation, between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worsening_clearlyAt_cold_wind: More intense cold and much stronger wind are expected mainly between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worsening_clearlyAt_cold_uv: More intense cold and very high UV radiation are expected mainly between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.worsening_clearlyAt_wind_uv: Much stronger wind and very high UV radiation are expected mainly between {{start}} and {{end}}.
riskTrend.partialSuffix: This forecast is based on the available data.

push.label: Receive alerts when heat risk ≥ moderate
push.enabled: Alerts enabled. You will receive notifications when risk is moderate or higher.

errors.notSupported: Your browser does not support Web Push.

link_insst: INSST: Heat stress and thermal risk

notify.uvModerate: Moderate UV index. Sun protection recommended if exposed.
notify.uvHigh: High UV index. Use sun protection and limit prolonged exposure.
notify.uvVeryHigh: Very high UV index. Sun protection is essential.
notify.uvExtreme: Extreme UV index. Avoid direct sun exposure.

search_help: Type at least 4 letters. Suggestions may require nearly the full city name.
alerts_none: There are currently no active weather alerts.
uv_night_message: There is no UV radiation at night.
uv_night_info: It is nighttime. There is no UV radiation risk.

uv.safe_time_hint: Indicative estimate. Use sun protection and reduce exposure during peak hours.

heat.low: Safe conditions. Stay hydrated and avoid direct sun during peak hours.
heat.moderate: Hydrate often, take breaks in cool areas, and avoid intense effort.
heat.high: High risk: limit outdoor activity, drink water frequently, and seek shade.
heat.extreme: Extreme danger: avoid going outside. High risk of heat exhaustion and heat stroke.

cold.low: Cool night: dress lightly and keep adequate ventilation.
cold.moderate: Dress in layers and avoid prolonged exposure outdoors.
cold.high: High risk: protect extremities and limit time outside.
cold.extreme: Severe danger: avoid going outside. Frostbite risk in minutes.

wind.moderate: Moderate wind: secure light objects and use caution.
wind.high: Strong wind: avoid wooded areas and secure outdoor furniture.
wind.extreme: Violent wind: stay indoors and keep away from trees and unstable structures.

fog.low: Light fog: be careful when travelling.
fog.moderate: Moderate fog: reduce speed and increase following distance.
fog.extreme: Zero visibility: stop travelling until conditions improve.

coast.moderate: Moderate swell: avoid rocky areas and narrow passages.
coast.high: Heavy swell: keep away from breakwaters and surf zones.
coast.extreme: Very heavy swell: extreme risk. Avoid walking near the sea.

activity.info_body: ThermoSafe uses device sensors to estimate physical activity level and adjust preventive recommendations.
activity.info_privacy: Data is processed locally on the device and is not sent to any server.

insst_heat: INSST: Heat stress and thermal risk
official_advice_share: Follow safety recommendations based on your current risk.

heat.mild: Hydrate often and rest in cool areas.
heat.moderate: Avoid intense effort and seek shade regularly.
heat.moderate_night: Temperatures remain elevated overnight. Stay hydrated, ventilate indoor spaces and avoid unnecessary effort.
heat.high: High risk: limit outdoor activity and hydrate continuously.
heat.high_night: Heat remains high overnight. Reduce effort, stay hydrated and improve ventilation.
heat.extreme: Extreme danger: avoid outdoor exposure. High heat-stroke risk.
heat.extreme_night: Extreme night-time heat. Avoid effort, stay hydrated and prioritise cool or air-conditioned spaces.

cold.mild: Low temperature: dress warmly and protect your hands.
cold.moderate: Very low temperature: use layers and avoid long exposure.
cold.high: High risk: protect extremities and limit outdoor activity.
cold.extreme: Extreme danger: avoid going outside. Frostbite risk.

wind.breezy: Light winds: no special measures required.
wind.moderate: Moderate winds: secure objects and use extra caution.
wind.strong: Strong winds: avoid wooded areas and secure outdoor furniture.
wind.very_strong: Very strong winds: stay indoors. Avoid unstable structures.

uv.moderate: Apply SPF 30+ sunscreen and wear sunglasses.
uv.high: Avoid direct sun exposure during the central hours of the day. Stay hydrated and use high sun protection.
uv.very_high: Maximum protection: long-sleeved shirt, cap/hat, sunglasses, and SPF 50+.
uv.extreme: Avoid sun exposure. Extreme risk of eye and skin damage.

official_advice.hydration: Hydrate regularly, even if you are not thirsty.
official_advice.rest: Rest in the shade during prolonged activity.
official_advice.sunAvoid: Avoid direct sun exposure during the middle of the day.
official_advice.coldClothes: In cold weather, wear layers and windproof protection.
official_advice.secureObjects: Secure outdoor objects that could become projectiles.
official_advice.avoidTrees: Avoid walking near unstable trees or branches.
official_advice.avoidUnstableStructures: Keep away from weak or unstable structures.
official_advice.symptoms: If you feel dizzy, nauseous, or confused, stop activity.
official_advice.symptomsCold: If you have chills, shivering, or confusion, seek shelter and warmth.

official_advice_footer: Based on INSST and AEMET guidance.

rec.safe: Safe conditions. Maintain your usual hydration.
rec.safeWithHighUV: Thermally safe conditions. Use caution due to solar radiation.

uvHigh: High UV index. Strong protection advised.
uvVeryHigh: Very high UV index. Sun protection is essential!
uv_source_note: Reference UV data (OpenUV/NASA). Values may vary by time and source.
